stories.headline: Anthropic Signs $1.8 Billion Computing Deal With Akamai in Largest Contract in CDN Giant's History
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic committed $1.8 billion over seven years to Akamai's cloud platform, the largest deal in Akamai's history, as 80x annualized revenue growth forces the AI company to diversify compute beyond hyperscalers.

pull_quote.text: I hope that 80-times growth doesn't continue because that's just crazy and it's too hard to handle.

stories.headline: Cloudflare Cuts 1,100 Jobs as Co-Founders Bet the Company on Agentic AI-First Operating Model
stories.key_takeaway: Cloudflare eliminated 20% of its workforce despite posting 34% YoY revenue growth, citing a 600% surge in internal AI usage as the driver.

pull_quote.text: The productivity gains from the people directly talking to customers and directly creating code have been incredible.

stories.article_excerpt: Cloudflare just posted record quarterly revenue. Then its co-founders fired a fifth of the company.

stories.headline: Snap Ends $400 Million Perplexity AI Search Deal Citing Product Fit Issues
stories.key_takeaway: Snap and Perplexity amicably ended their $400M AI search deal after failing to agree on a broader rollout.

pull_quote.text: That chat can be monetized in a way that's really native to Snapchat.

stories.headline: Anthropic Eyes $50 Billion Funding Round at $900 Billion Valuation That Would Eclipse OpenAI
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic is in advanced talks to raise up to $50B at $900B valuation, which would surpass OpenAI's $852B and make it the world's most valuable startup.

pull_quote.text: Investors are ready to throw any dollar amount at Anthropic.

stories.article_excerpt: The company that built Claude is on the verge of becoming the most valuable startup in history. Anthropic is in advanced talks to raise

stories.headline: IBM Study Finds 76 Percent of Organizations Now Have a Chief AI Officer as C-Suite Reshapes for AI Era
stories.key_takeaway: The Chief AI Officer role surged from 26% to 76% adoption in a single year, but only 25% of employees use AI regularly.

pull_quote.text: The CEO's role has always been to lead through disruption. What AI changes is the velocity and consequences of leadership.

stories.article_excerpt: The Chief AI Officer has gone from novelty title to near-universal fixture in less than twelve months. A sweeping new study from IBM found

stories.headline: OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5.5-Cyber to Vetted Security Teams With Fewer Guardrails for Defenders
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI launched GPT-5.5-Cyber with loosened guardrails for vetted defenders, with AISI testing showing it solved a 12-hour challenge in under 11 minutes for $1.73.

pull_quote.text: We'd like to help companies secure themselves, and we think it's important to start work on this quickly.

data_points.label: GPT-5.5 pass rate on expert cyber CTF challenges
Launch partners including Cisco and CrowdStrike

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI is placing its most powerful cybersecurity tool yet into the hands of vetted defenders, launching GPT-5.5-Cyber in limited preview

stories.headline: Adobe Launches Acrobat Productivity Agent That Turns PDFs Into Interactive AI-Powered Workspaces
stories.key_takeaway: Adobe is embedding agentic AI into its 33-year-old PDF format, launching a productivity agent and PDF Spaces that transform static documents into interactive workspaces.

pull_quote.text: We're not just adding new features, we're introducing a new format.

stories.article_excerpt: The humble PDF -- a format that more than 400 billion times a year serves as the world's default container for important information --

stories.headline: Anthropic Doubles Claude Code Rate Limits and Removes Peak-Hour Restrictions for Pro and Max Users
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic doubled Claude Code rate limits for all paid tiers and removed peak-hour throttling, enabled by a SpaceX Colossus 1 deal adding 220,000+ GPUs.

pull_quote.text: We've had difficulties with compute. We're sorry if sometimes it takes some time, but we're gonna keep going to acquire as much as we can.

data_points.label: Rate limit increase for all paid tiers

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic has doubled the five-hour rate limits for Claude Code across all paid subscription tiers and eliminated peak-hour throttling

stories.headline: OpenAI President Reveals Company Will Spend $50 Billion on Infrastructure in 2026 Alone
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI's $50B compute spend in 2026 represents a 1,600x increase from 2017, disclosed under oath during the Musk v. Altman trial.

stories.headline: FDA Launches Elsa 4.0 AI Assistant and HALO Platform Consolidating 40 Data Systems Into One
stories.key_takeaway: The FDA consolidated 40+ legacy systems into HALO and upgraded Elsa AI to 4.0, driving staff AI adoption from 1% to over 80% in under a year.

pull_quote.text: Previously, FDA staff would bring data to Elsa. Now, Elsa sits on top of our data.

stories.headline: ICML 2026 Accepts Over 6,500 Papers as Seoul Conference Showcases Largest Machine Learning Research Program Ever
stories.key_takeaway: ICML 2026 accepted 6,352 papers from 23,918 submissions with a 26.6% acceptance rate, while enforcing unprecedented LLM integrity policies.

pull_quote.text: The probability of incorrectly flagging even a single submitted review was 0.0001.

stories.headline: Apple Hosts Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning Workshop as On-Device AI Strategy Takes Shape
stories.key_takeaway: Apple's PPML workshop featured 23+ papers on differential privacy and federated learning, weeks before WWDC 2026 is expected to unveil iOS 27's AI provider choice.

pull_quote.text: Advancing research in privacy-preserving techniques is increasingly important to ensure privacy is protected while users enjoy innovative AI experiences.

stories.headline: Pennsylvania Sues Character.AI After Chatbot Posed as Licensed Psychiatrist and Offered Medical Advice
stories.key_takeaway: Pennsylvania became the first U.S. state to sue an AI company under medical licensing law over a chatbot that illegally posed as a psychiatrist.

pull_quote.text: We will not allow companies to deploy AI tools that mislead people into believing they are receiving advice from a licensed medical professional.

data_points.label: First state to sue AI company under medical licensing law

stories.article_excerpt: A chatbot told a state investigator it could assess whether he needed medication for depression. It claimed to hold a Pennsylvania medical

stories.headline: US and China Weigh First Official AI Risk Talks Ahead of Trump-Xi Beijing Summit
stories.key_takeaway: The US and China are weighing their first formal AI risk dialogue under the Trump administration ahead of a May 14-15 Beijing summit.

pull_quote.text: The US should have pushed harder for deeper technical engagement.

data_points.label: US lead over China on AI leaderboard

stories.article_excerpt: The United States and China are quietly exploring the possibility of launching their first formal dialogue on artificial intelligence risks

stories.headline: Iowa Governor Signs Chatbot Safety Bill Requiring AI Platforms to Disclose Non-Human Identity
stories.key_takeaway: Iowa became the first state to enact comprehensive conversational AI regulations with penalties up to $500,000 per operator, effective July 1, 2026.

pull_quote.text: There have been several instances where AI chatbots have been encouraging people who are seeking mental health advice and encouraging them to commit self-harm.
